queries.question: Show me all the medical devices and their makers.
queries.sql: SELECT MedicalDevices.deviceName,  Scientists.fullname  FROM DeviceDevelopment JOIN  Scientists ON Scientists.id = DeviceDevelopment.scientistId JOIN MedicalDevices ON MedicalDevices.id = DeviceDevelopment.medicalDeviceId
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?devicename ?fullname WHERE {
  ?devicedevelopment a :DeviceDevelopment .
  ?scientists a :Scientists .
  ?devicedevelopment p:hasScientists ?scientists .
  ?medicaldevices a :MedicalDevices .
  ?devicedevelopment p:hasMedicalDevices ?medicaldevices .
  ?medicaldevices p:deviceName ?devicename .
  ?scientists p:name ?fullname .
}

queries.question: Show me all the medical devices and their makers.
queries.sql: SELECT MedicalDevices.deviceName,  Companies.name  FROM DeviceDevelopment JOIN  Companies ON Companies.id = DeviceDevelopment.companyId JOIN MedicalDevices ON MedicalDevices.id = DeviceDevelopment.medicalDeviceId
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?devicename ?name WHERE {
  ?devicedevelopment a :DeviceDevelopment .
  ?companies a :Companies .
  ?devicedevelopment p:hasCompanies ?companies .
  ?medicaldevices a :MedicalDevices .
  ?devicedevelopment p:hasMedicalDevices ?medicaldevices .
  ?medicaldevices p:deviceName ?devicename .
  ?companies p:name ?name .
}

queries.question: Show me all the medical devices and their makers.
queries.sql: SELECT MedicalDevices.deviceName,  Scientists.fullname, Companies.name  FROM DeviceDevelopment JOIN  Scientists ON Scientists.id = DeviceDevelopment.scientistId JOIN MedicalDevices ON MedicalDevices.id = DeviceDevelopment.medicalDeviceId  JOIN  Companies ON Companies.id = DeviceDevelopment.companyId
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?devicename ?fullname ?name WHERE {
  ?devicedevelopment a :DeviceDevelopment .
  ?scientists a :Scientists .
  ?devicedevelopment p:hasScientists ?scientists .
  ?medicaldevices a :MedicalDevices .
  ?devicedevelopment p:hasMedicalDevices ?medicaldevices .
  ?companies a :Companies .
  ?devicedevelopment p:hasCompanies ?companies .
  ?medicaldevices p:deviceName ?devicename .
  ?scientists p:name ?fullname .
  ?companies p:name ?name .
}

queries.question: Which scientist and company made the cheapest device?
queries.sql: SELECT Scientists.fullname, Companies.name FROM DeviceDevelopment JOIN  Scientists ON Scientists.id = DeviceDevelopment.scientistId JOIN MedicalDevices ON MedicalDevices.id = DeviceDevelopment.medicalDeviceId  JOIN  Companies ON Companies.id = DeviceDevelopment.companyId ORDER BY price ASC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname ?name WHERE {
  ?devicedevelopment a :DeviceDevelopment .
  ?scientists a :Scientists .
  ?devicedevelopment p:hasScientists ?scientists .
  ?medicaldevices a :MedicalDevices .
  ?devicedevelopment p:hasMedicalDevices ?medicaldevices .
  ?companies a :Companies .
  ?devicedevelopment p:hasCompanies ?companies .
  ?scientists p:name ?fullname .
  ?companies p:name ?name .
  ?medicaldevices p:price ?price_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?price_o)
LIMIT 1

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me all the medical devices and their makers.
Who made the cheapest device?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  full: { SELECT ?fullname ?name WHERE {
  ?devicedevelopment a :DeviceDevelopment .
  ?scientists a :Scientists .
  ?devicedevelopment p:hasScientists ?scientists .
  ?medicaldevices a :MedicalDevices .
  ?devicedevelopment p:hasMedicalDevices ?medicaldevices .
  ?companies a :Companies .
  ?devicedevelopment p:hasCompanies ?companies .
  ?scientists p:name ?fullname .
  ?companies p:name ?name .
  ?medicaldevices p:price ?price_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?price_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  component: { SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?devicedevelopment a :DeviceDevelopment .
  ?scientists a :Scientists .
  ?devicedevelopment p:hasScientists ?scientists .
  ?medicaldevices a :MedicalDevices .
  ?devicedevelopment p:hasMedicalDevices ?medicaldevices .
  ?scientists p:name ?fullname .
  ?medicaldevices p:price ?price_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?price_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  component_2: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?devicedevelopment a :DeviceDevelopment .
  ?companies a :Companies .
  ?devicedevelopment p:hasCompanies ?companies .
  ?medicaldevices a :MedicalDevices .
  ?devicedevelopment p:hasMedicalDevices ?medicaldevices .
  ?companies p:name ?name .
  ?medicaldevices p:price ?price_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?price_o)
LIMIT 1 }
}
